title: Why did Hugh's diet not work?

meanings.usage: 指规定吃的食物，常用go on a diet表示节食
形容人体型肥胖，带有主观色彩
用于描述过去不久发生的事情，常与过去时连用
forbid的过去分词作形容词，修饰名词
pay someone a visit表示正式拜访某人
修饰形容词或动词，表示显而易见
描述人感到不好意思、难堪的情绪
由形容词guilty+ly构成，修饰动作
表示不经常发生，频率较低
be strict with someone表示对某人严格
作动词时常与反身代词连用，如reward oneself
指包装好的物品，常用send a parcel表示寄包裹
强调某物内部装有某些东西，不用于进行时
lead someone into表示带某人进入某处

phrases.usage: 表示开始节食，控制饮食

examples.en: She decided to go on a diet after gaining weight.
examples.zh: 她在体重增加后决定节食。

examples.en: I paid him a visit yesterday.
He is as fat as ever.
First of all, I want to introduce myself.
examples.zh: 首先，我想介绍一下自己。

examples.en: He wrote out a long list of forbidden foods.
examples.zh: 他列出了一长串禁止吃的食物。

examples.en: He led me into his room.
examples.zh: 他把我带进了他的房间。

examples.en: It was obvious that he was embarrassed.
He showed me the contents of the parcel.
examples.zh: 他给我看了包裹里的东西。

examples.en: I rang the bell and waited at the door.
examples.zh: 我按了门铃，在门口等着。

examples.en: His diet was so strict that he had to reward himself occasionally.
examples.zh: 他的节食计划如此严格，以至于他不得不偶尔奖励自己。

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Past Simple Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的动作或存在的状态，常与表示过去的时间状语连用
grammar.usage: 描述过去发生的具体事件，如故事、经历等

examples.en: He began his diet a week ago.
Yesterday I paid him a visit.

grammar.title: so...that... 结果状语从句
grammar.definition: so后面接形容词或副词，that后面接表示结果的从句，意思是"如此...以至于..."
grammar.structure: so + 形容词/副词 + that + 从句
grammar.usage: 用来表示程度或结果，强调某种状态或行为导致的结果

examples.en: Things got so bad recently that he decided to go on a diet.
examples.zh: 情况变得如此糟糕，以至于他决定节食。

examples.en: He was so embarrassed that he couldn't speak.
examples.zh: 他太尴尬了，以至于说不出话来。

grammar.title: 一般过去时的否定句和疑问句
grammar.definition: 否定句在动词前加did not (didn't)，疑问句将Did提到句首
grammar.structure: 否定：主语 + did not + 动词原形；疑问：Did + 主语 + 动词原形？
grammar.usage: 用于对过去发生的事情进行否定或提问

examples.en: Did you pay him a visit?

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + has/have always been + 形容词

original.en: My friend, Hugh, has always been fat.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be + as + 形容词 + as ever

original.en: Hugh was still as fat as ever.

imitations.en: She is as beautiful as ever.
The city is as crowded as ever.
imitations.zh: 这座城市和以前一样拥挤。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It is obvious that + 主语 + 动词

original.en: It was obvious that he was very embarrassed.

imitations.en: It was obvious that she was telling a lie.
It is obvious that he loves her.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + explained that + 句子

original.en: He explained that his diet was so strict that he had to reward himself occasionally.
original.zh: 他解释说他的节食计划太严格了，以至于他不得不偶尔奖励自己。

imitations.en: She explained that she was tired.
He explained that the plan didn't work.
imitations.zh: 他解释说计划没有奏效。
